top_critical.title: Critical WordPress Vulnerability Exploited in the Wild
top_critical.summary: A critical vulnerability in WordPress is being actively exploited in the wild, with attackers leveraging it to cause a range of malicious outcomes including site takeovers and malware injection. Dozen
top_critical.architects_take: Audit all WordPress deployments across your cloud estate immediately and apply the relevant patch or mitigation — prioritise internet-facing instances and those handling sensitive data. Consider deploying a Web Application Firewall (WAF) rule to virtual-patch the vulnerability whilst remediation is scheduled, and review whether your vulnerability management pipeline has visibility into CMS-layer risks, not just OS and container layers.
